hero.headline: Where every flavour tells a story
hero.subheadline: A modern gastronomic experience combining Mediterranean flavours and creative cuisine in the heart of Valencia.

atmosphere.subtitle: Ambience
atmosphere.title: Our atmosphere
atmosphere.paragraph1: At Feliz Valencia we care for every detail to create a space where gastronomy and ambience come together.
atmosphere.paragraph2: Warm lighting, Mediterranean cuisine and attentive service to enjoy at your own pace.

story.subtitle: OUR STORY
story.title: Our story and team
story.paragraph1: FELIZ was born in Valencia in 2017 from the dream of Anastasia, a woman passionate about gastronomy and about creating a place where people could feel happy.
story.paragraph2: From day one, her idea was simple: to create a cosy corner where every dish is prepared with care, fresh ingredients and special attention to every detail.
story.paragraph3: Today Anastasia runs the restaurant together with her team, a group of cooks and professionals who share the same passion for Mediterranean cuisine. Together they work every day to offer guests an authentic, warm and memorable experience.
story.paragraph4: At FELIZ we believe that good food brings people together. That is why every dish, from a Valencian paella to our tapas and grilled meats, is prepared with dedication and respect for tradition.
story.paragraph5: Our goal remains the same as on day one: to make everyone who walks into FELIZ leave with a smile.
story.teamSubtitle: The people who make the FELIZ experience possible every day.
